author: FireAndRescueAcademy
description: Assign Discord rank roles from MissionChief earned credits using MembersScraper and approved MemberSync links.
install_msg: RoleBasedCredits loaded. Link Discord roles with `[p]creditrankset role "Firefighter" @role`, set a promotion channel, then run `[p]creditranks sync`.
short: Automatically assign Discord roles based on ingame credits.
end_user_data_statement: This cog reads approved MemberSync links and MissionChief earned credits from existing local cogs. It stores guild-level role mappings, promotion channel settings, and last assigned rank keys.
